name: Safe Box Crack
description: Safe Box Crack is an exciting puzzle game where you unlock safes, taking on the role of a locksmith conquering the toughest safes. Spin the dials, decode mechanisms, and choose the perfect moment to unlock successfully. Each level presents a new logical challenge with increasing difficulty. The gameplay is simple yet addictive, sharpening your thinking and reflexes. Download now to test your safe-cracking skills!
